name: Suspicious Csc Source File Folder Detected
description: Detects the execution of `csc.exe` with a source file located in a suspicious folder like AppData or the Windows Temp directory. Adversaries may use this technique to compile and execute malicious code to bypass security controls and masquerade as a legitimate process.

prompts.prompt: An alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: the process **`csc.exe`** was executed with a source file located in a suspicious directory, **{command}**. This is a strong indicator of **Execution** and **Defense Evasion** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1027.004**), where an adversary is attempting to compile and execute malicious code. The event occurred under the user **{user}**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the malicious file.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line that was executed, which includes the suspicious source file path.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account that performed the action.
